fsymId.description: Security-level FactSet Permanent Identifier associated with the identifier.

date.description: Date of the record in YYYY-MM-DD format.

documentId.description: Unique Identifier for each document or filing which contains the outstanding shares position.

requestId.description: FactSet Security Permanent Identifier that was used for the request.

publicationDate.description: Exact date that results have been communicated to the market.

fiscalYear.description: The company's fiscal year corresponding to the report.

reportingPeriodDescription.description: Textual description of the reporting period.

reportingPeriod.description:
Code representing the unique reporting period. Options are as follows:
- 1 - 1st Quarter
- 2 - 2nd Quarter
- 3 - 3rd Quarter
- 4 - 4th Quarter
- 6 - Mid-Year

description.description: Different stock types based on the rights and benefits from ownership.

adrDescription.description: Different stock types based on the rights and benefits from ownership for the ADR.

adrRatio.description: Number of common or ordinary shares that are equivalent to one American Depositary Receipt (ADR).

adrFsymId.description: Unique FactSet generated identifier assigned to a security, representing the ADR security.

totalOutstanding.description: Number of shares outstanding as of `date`.

adrTotalOutstanding.description: Number of shares outstanding for the ADR as of `date`.
